detectors.description:
Reentrancy in CristianoRonaldo._transfer(address,address,uint256) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#645-769):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#709)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#783-795)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#715)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#803)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#767)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#929)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#909)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#911)
	CristianoRonaldo._rOwned (CristianoRonaldo.sol#321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CristianoRonaldo._takeTeam(uint256) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#923-931)
	- CristianoRonaldo._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#883-919)
	- CristianoRonaldo.balanceOf(address) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#471-475)
	- CristianoRonaldo.constructor() (CristianoRonaldo.sol#405-435)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#767)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#937)
	CristianoRonaldo._rTotal (CristianoRonaldo.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CristianoRonaldo._getCurrentSupply() (CristianoRonaldo.sol#1079-1089)
	- CristianoRonaldo._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#935-941)
	- CristianoRonaldo.constructor() (CristianoRonaldo.sol#405-435)
	- CristianoRonaldo.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (CristianoRonaldo.sol#567-589)
